RemediationStrings.Title: AllowEncryptionOracle (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\CredSSP\Parameters\AllowEncryptionOracle must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowProtectedCreds (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CredentialsDelegation\AllowProtectedCreds must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: RunAsPPL (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RunAsPPL must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: HypervisorEnforcedCodeIntegrity (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\HypervisorEnforcedCodeIntegrity must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: HVCIMATRequired (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\HVCIMATRequired must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: LsaCfgFlags (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\LsaCfgFlags must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: MachineIdentityIsolation (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\MachineIdentityIsolation must be 3. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: ConfigureSystemGuardLaunch (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\ConfigureSystemGuardLaunch must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: ConfigureKernelShadowStacksLaunch (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\ConfigureKernelShadowStacksLaunch must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: LimitBlankPasswordUse (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\LimitBlankPasswordUse must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictAnonymousSAM (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RestrictAnonymousSAM must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictAnonymous (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RestrictAnonymous must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: SCENoApplyLegacyAuditPolicy (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\SCENoApplyLegacyAuditPolicy must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: NTLMMinClientSec (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\MSV1_0\NTLMMinClientSec must be 537395200. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: LmCompatibilityLevel (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\LmCompatibilityLevel must be 5. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: allownullsessionfallback (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\MSV1_0\allownullsessionfallback must be 0. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: NTLMMinServerSec (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\MSV1_0\NTLMMinServerSec must be 537395200. Severity: Critical. Category: Credential Protection.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictRemoteSAM (Credential Protection)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RestrictRemoteSAM must be O:BAG:BAD:(A;;RC;;;BA). Severity: Medium. Category: Credential Protection.
